full_text:
tCycIF processing

Overview of pipeline

Tribus (by Monday)

Priority samples & markers

1 mln threshold

Normalisation for DAPI - S084_pAdn (from batch 3)

Exchanged for 7-380_iOme (from batch 3) as it includes all 5 cyle DAPIs

Speaker notes:
Was chosen as it has similar shape to TLS chosen sample 7-S131_iOme by Ada PDS samples have 4 cycles in batch 3

Normalisation for CD4 - S188_iOme (from batch 2)

Speaker notes:
Batch 1 - Cycle 1 488
Batch 2 - Cycle 1 488
Batch 3 - PDS: Cycle 1 488; IDS: Cycle 2 488 (TLS IDS: Cycle 4 488)

Normalisation for NKG2a - S268_iOme (from batch 2)

Speaker notes:
Chosen as average across batches

Batch 1 - Cycle 3 647
Batch 2 - Cycle 3 647
Batch 3 - PDS: Cycle 3 647; IDS: Cycle 4 647 (TLS IDS: Cycle 8 647)

Normalisation for CD11c -

Only few samples follow reference

All the rest samples follow same high intensity peak first pattern

Speaker notes:
Batch 1 - Cycle 2 555
Batch 2 - Cycle 2 555
Batch 3 - PDS: Cycle 2 555; IDS: Cycle 3 555 (TLS IDS: Cycle 4 555)

Normalisation for HLA-A

Two types of distributions:
Unimodal 2. Bimodal

Normalisation for filtered CD11c - S076_iOme (from batch 1)

Speaker notes:
Was chosen as the most similar in distribution to S046_iOme from TLS

Batch 1 - Cycle 2 555
Batch 2 - Cycle 2 555
Batch 3 - PDS: Cycle 2 555; IDS: Cycle 3 555 (TLS IDS: Cycle 4 555)

Normalisation for filtered CD8a - S139_iOme (from batch 1) repeated in batch 3?

Speaker notes:
Was chosen as the most similar in distribution to S046_iOme from TLS

Batch 1 - Cycle 2 647
Batch 2 - Cycle 2 647 + antigen retrieval 
Batch 3 - PDS: Cycle 3 647; IDS: Cycle 2 647 (TLS IDS: Cycle 4 647) + antigen retrieval

Batch 1 - aSMA (instead of Vimentin) -> S072_iOme

Majority of samples have bimodal distribution (including reference from TLS)

Few samples have distinct unimodal intensity

Speaker notes:
Chose S072_iOme instead of TLS sample as we don’t have in official batch 3 panel aSMA, so chose representative of majority in Batch 1

QC part 2 for batch 1 - area and DNA ratio

QC batch 1 effect of normalisation

QC part 2 for batch 2 - area and DNA ratio

QC batch 2 normalisation
